name: 𝚂𝚑𝚊𝚖𝚒𝚕 𝙽𝚘𝚌𝚝𝚊𝚕𝚒𝚜 - 𝚂𝚒𝚛𝚎𝚗 𝙰𝚄
description:
𝙲𝚘𝚘𝚔𝚒𝚎 𝚁𝚞𝚗 𝙺𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚍𝚘𝚖

꒷꒦︶꒷꒦︶ ๋ ࣭ ⭑꒷꒦

⭐🍎: Guys this bot has been in my list for WEEKS. Not even kidding, I've had this idea in my head for so long. My notes are literally FILLED with descriptions, first messages... Everything!!!
Can't believe it took me almost— wait. Not even almost, it was a whole month!!! Four weeks!!!???! Actually maybe even more if I change my mind last minute.... Hopefully I don't do that..
also i know im ranting lol. But I just reallyyy had to talk about how I kept re-writing the character description so it could be detailed enough for the AI to hopefully not misunderstand anything in Shamil's personality, the way he should act, etc... AND the first message as well. I legit kept going, "oh yeah this is so amazing", only then for me to change my mind the next day.. I made the bot for me but my standards are high lol ;-;
So yeah, since my brain wasn't working as well for this bot, this might get a ton of updates once I figure out the whole AU instead of just basing it all around shadow milk and pure vanilla because of my current fixation on sdvn.
Like, the other ancients don't even have full coverage? Like the only thing that has some of their characteristics is the first message in the Vani Elouris bot— And it's not even fully describing why they rejected Vani's invite. Like legit they only have names and the slightest details in my notes app..
and of course since I might go on about updating Vani and Shamil in the future, I might also put an update log somewhere here in the bio, maybe after the little art I put at the end of my little ranting sessions and details.
If there's nothing then I probably changed my mind about updating anything cause... I don't wanna keep scrolling and scrolling for hours on end just re-reading and proofreading a bunch of text cause sometimes I catch myself with a weird freaking posture, and somehow also end up forgetting to drink and eat— Too focused for my own good...
Dear future me hopefully you don't update the bots too much or, better yet, just don't update it at all. Don't make yourself suffer just make a new bot!!! ;-;

╰── ──╮

FYI people, some headcanons or alterations to Shamil (SMC) personality may be present in this au. He is a siren.

╰› Cause obviously I can't make him act as he does in the canon game... How would that work with a siren actually?? That would be too overpowered imo. Imagine a siren not only capable of controlling/luring someone with, let's admit, a pretty amazing voice, but they could also alter reality??? What???
